scripts.prisma:migrate: npm --prefix backend exec prisma migrate dev
scripts.prisma:deploy: npm --prefix backend exec prisma migrate deploy
scripts.prisma:seed: npm --prefix backend exec prisma db seed
scripts.setup: git submodule update --init --recursive && npm run install:all && npm run prisma:generate && npm run prisma:migrate && npm run prisma:seed
scripts.install:all: npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
